use_cases: Landing page hero background with animated 3D visuals
Fullscreen visual overlay for streaming or media applications
Creative portfolio showcase with dynamic shader art
Ambient background effect for dashboard or app loading states
Branded visual experience for product launches or events
ai_summary: A WebGL2 fullscreen shader component rendering a dynamic 3D ray-marched visualization with colorful glowing effects. Uses a custom fragment shader with time-based animation, producing cosmic-looking abstract geometry with oscillating color gradients. Includes vertex shader for fullscreen triangle rendering and WebGL utility functions for shader compilation and linking. Responds to resolution and time uniforms for smooth animation across devices.
